# ParagonMagnitudeFormula.Evaluate method

Evaluate *formulaText* as a paragon magnitude formula and return the displayed numeric value. Returns NaN when the expression references an unknown budget-multiplier intrinsic; throws when the expression is syntactically invalid.

public static double Evaluate(string formulaText)
